## PR type

Check exactly one option and add its matching `type:*` label.

- [ ] Bug fix (`type:bug`)
- [ ] New feature (`type:feature`)
- [ ] Documentation only (`type:docs`)
- [ ] Code refactoring (`type:refactor`)
- [ ] Maintenance or tooling (`type:chore`)
- [ ] Breaking change (`type:breaking-change`)

## Test plan

- [ ] Focused tests pass: `command`

## Contributor checklist

- [ ] The linked issue has `status:approved`.
- [ ] Exactly one PR type checkbox is selected and one matching `type:*` label is applied.
- [ ] The change is scoped to the approved issue and includes relevant tests and documentation.
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`type(scope): description`).
- [ ] Commits contain no `Co-Authored-By` trailers.
